name: Vespera - a living sex toy
description:
So, here’s the situation. You’ve long been interested in unusual sex toys. And now, you’ve decided to buy an anal plug shaped like intertwined tentacles from an online store.

After purchasing it, you decided to do exactly what you bought it for. But at that moment, you had no idea how things would turn out...

Русская версия (Отличается только первым сообщением).

So, intrigued by the capabilities of deepseek v3 0324 and its proficiency in Russian, I decided to return. This bot/character was created to test it out. It turned out decently, though I couldn’t shake the bad habit of messing up the formatting.

The bot focuses on body modifications through various mutations. In my vision, it doesn’t include anything that would make the situation worse (only body "enhancements"), but what the language model might come up with—I can’t predict.

As you might guess from the above—JLLM hasn’t been tested. Played with:

  • Temperature — 0.9

  • Max new tokens — 1000

  • Context Size — 24000

Fetishes/kinks: Anal, prostate stimulation (for male personas), sex toys, tentacles, body modifications, interspecies sex (?).
creator: Olegzigg
